strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly aligning with the primary stack requirements
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and code generation frameworks
Strong background in scalable architectures, microservices, and performance optimization across multiple high-traffic systems
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java (secondary stack) in recent roles, though background suggests adaptability
No mention of PostgreSQL or NoSQL (MySQL/MongoDB) in current roles, despite prior experience—may require reassessment of depth
Primary resume focus leans toward early-stage and open-source projects rather than enterprise-level internal tooling

key_factors.factor: Enterprise-grade system exposure (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical depth in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure and scalable architectures. His career spans high-traffic systems, microservices, and open-source contributions, though recent roles emphasize early-stage and open-source projects. Concerns about Nest.js/Kotlin/Java familiarity and enterprise tooling focus are mitigated by his adaptability and problem-solving track record.
